entry.title: New: RES26-023 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, LODGING, GROUND TRANSPORTATION, AND RELATED MATERIALS, VALUED AT $1,975, TO THE CITY FROM THE METROPOLITAN COMMUNITY COLLEGE FOR A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE OFFICE OF ECONOMIC REVITALIZATION TO ATTEND THE COUNTIES OF CAREER SUCCESS: BUILDING A WORK READY FUTURE MEETING FROM MARCH 2-4, 2026, IN OMAHA, NEBRASKA.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
